subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Give thanks unto God that thou hast illumined thy countenance with the love of the Most Glorious Beauty and hast drunk the wine of divine knowledge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله شکر کن خدا را که بمحبت جمال ابهی رخ برافروختی و باده معرفت نوشیدی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @personal instructions
